headline: How The Exelon (EXC) Investment Story Is Evolving With New Targets And Grid Projects
summary: Exelon’s fair value estimate has shifted slightly, moving from US$50.44 to US$50.88 per share, alongside a series of refreshed price targets from research houses. Analysts lifting targets into the low to high US$50s, as well as those holding more cautious stances with targets from US$44 to US$53, are tying their views to updated assumptions on execution, capital spending and regulatory trends. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these moves and track the evolving story around...
